name: Ruimin Huang
title: Artificial Intelligence Student / AI Agent Developer
motto: Focused on AI agent development, solution architecture, and AI application implementation.

hero.eyebrow: AI Agent Developer · Solution Architect · AI Engineer
hero.roleLine: AI Agent Development | Solution Architecture | Intelligent Systems
hero.summary: I design and build AI-powered solutions that transform complex business requirements into practical, efficient applications.

about.title: About
about.p1: I am Ruimin Huang, an Artificial Intelligence student at South China Normal University, pursuing a dual degree with the University of Aberdeen. I focus on AI agent development, solution architecture, and intelligent application design.
about.p2: I have internship experience at Digital Guangdong, Baidu PaddlePaddle, and Guangdong Academy of Sciences, where I worked on AI audit systems, intelligent customer service agents, and enterprise automation applications. I also lead a provincial innovation project on LLM-based investment advisory classification systems.

items.title: Solution Architecture Intern
items.company: Digital Guangdong Network Construction Co., Ltd.
description: Translated business requirements into technical solutions for AI audit systems, participating in Prompt design and technical roadmap planning.
Participated in audit standards and process design for pollutant monitoring and inspection scenarios.
Built AI audit agent prototypes based on the Dify platform, applying natural language processing technology to automated audit scenarios.
Supported project delivery through documentation preparation and quality management planning.

items.title: AI Agent Development Intern
items.company: Baidu PaddlePaddle (Guangzhou) - Guangdong Yuejiang Industrial Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Built the core framework for an intelligent digital customer service agent based on Baidu Qianfan AppBuilder, defining dialogue flows and business logic.

Designed multi-turn dialogue scenarios, combining natural language processing technology to enhance semantic understanding capabilities, and optimized model performance through data training to improve processing accuracy and response speed in common customer consultation scenarios.

items.title: Frontend Development Intern
items.company: Guangdong Academy of Sciences Institute of Intelligent Manufacturing
description: Analyzed the working principles and data output formats of laser trackers, developed WinForm desktop applications using C#, integrated laser tracker APIs, and implemented real-time coordinate data acquisition and visualization.
Designed and implemented data storage modules to save coordinate data in structured formats for subsequent analysis, improving usability and efficiency.

items.name: LLM-Based Investment Advisory Classification System
items.description: Conducted in-depth research on financial industry needs for commodity market information, selected large language model solutions (such as GPT series), and performed model fine-tuning for specific scenarios. Designed and developed the system core architecture, including data input, text analysis, and classification output modules; continuously optimized model performance through iterative testing to improve classification accuracy and response speed. Established evaluation metrics (such as precision, recall) for quantitative assessment of system effectiveness.

items.name: Why is the New Gaokao Policy Favored?
items.description: First Prize in South China Normal University Winter Social Practice Research Competition. Built a dual-chain mediation model based on academic and career perspectives, proposing research hypotheses on the relationships between policy satisfaction, academic performance, and career development. Used SPSS 4.0 for descriptive statistics and correlation analysis to explore variable relationships; used Mplus 7.0 to build and validate structural equation models (SEM), assessing model fit and significance.

items.supervisor: Provincial Undergraduate Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program
description: Conducted in-depth research on financial industry needs for commodity market information, selected large language model solutions (such as GPT series), and performed model fine-tuning for specific scenarios.
Designed and developed the system core architecture, including data input, text analysis, and classification output modules; continuously optimized model performance through iterative testing.

items.courses: Relevant coursework: Python Programming, Linear Algebra, Advanced Mathematics, Discrete Mathematics, JAVA Programming, Web Application Development, Database Systems, AI Fundamentals, Machine Learning, Deep Learning.
